body:
APPROVE
Clean, contract-aligned refactor: usage envelopes are detected by JSON pointer presence rather than positive value, so explicit upstream zeros propagate verbatim. The struct godoc, contract prose, and three harness-level tests cover the AC matrix; the virtual/native paths in service_execute.go also drop their prior `> 0` gates appropriately. One small nit (non-blocking): the iteration "registered harnesses" wording in AC3 is s…

error: failed to push some refs to 'https://github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent.git': exit status 1
Clean, contract-aligned refactor: usage envelopes are detected by JSON pointer presence rather than positive value, so explicit upstream zeros propagate verbatim. The struct godoc, contract prose, and three harness-level tests cover the AC matrix; the virtual/native paths in service_execute.go also drop their prior `> 0` gates appropriately. One small nit (non-blocking): the iteration "registered harnesses" wording in AC3 is satisfied by three independent same-named tests rather than a registry-driven loop, which is fine but worth flagging in case future harnesses get added without a corresponding test file.
